# Step 02: Analyze Business Logic
# PrecisionParts Manufacturing System - Business Rules Extraction
# Generated by GitHub Copilot CLI

## 1. Authentication & Authorization

### Login Rules (frmLogin.frm)
- Users authenticate with username + password against Users table
- **Plain-text password comparison** (no hashing/salting)
- Maximum 3 failed login attempts before lockout
- On successful login: stores g_CurrentUserID, g_CurrentUsername, g_CurrentUserRole
- Checks User.Active flag — inactive users cannot log in
- Database connection initialized at login time

### Role-Based Access Control (frmMain.frm)
| Role              | Work Orders | Inventory | QC      | Shipping | Reports | Admin |
|-------------------|-------------|-----------|---------|----------|---------|-------|
| Administrator     | Full        | Full      | Full    | Full     | Full    | Full  |
| Manager           | Full        | Full      | Full    | Full     | Full    | No    |
| Operator          | Create/Edit | View      | No      | No       | Limited | No    |
| Quality Control   | View        | View      | Full    | No       | QC Only | No    |
| Shipping          | View        | View      | No      | Full     | Ship    | No    |

## 2. Work Order Management (clsWorkOrder.cls + frmWorkOrder.frm)

### Work Order Lifecycle
```
New → In Progress → Completed → (Shipped)
 ↓        ↓
 On Hold  Cancelled
```

### Status Transition Rules
- New: Initial state on creation
- In Progress: Work has begun, start date set
- Completed: All quantity produced, completion date auto-set
- On Hold: Temporarily paused (can resume to In Progress)
- Cancelled: Permanently stopped

### Validation Rules
- Part Number required, format: PP-XXXX-NNN (validated via clsPart.ValidatePartNumber)
- Quantity must be > 0
- QuantityCompleted cannot exceed Quantity
- DueDate must be >= 2000-01-01
- StartDate cannot be after DueDate
- If status = Completed and no CompletionDate, auto-set to Now
- Part must exist in Parts table
- Cannot delete if QualityChecks or ShippingManifests reference it

### Work Order Number Generation (modUtilities.bas)
- Format: "WO-YYYYMMDD-NNN" (e.g., WO-20240315-001)
- Date-based with sequential counter per day

### Cost Calculation (clsWorkOrder.CalculateCost)
- Material Cost = UnitCost (from Parts table) × Quantity
- Labor Cost = Quantity × 0.5 hrs/part × $45.00/hr
- Overhead = 15% of (Material + Labor)
- **Total Cost = (MaterialCost + LaborCost) × 1.15**
- Business rule: Labor rate and overhead % are hardcoded

## 3. Inventory Management (clsInventory.cls + frmInventory.frm)

### Reorder Status Logic
```
Available = QuantityOnHand + QuantityOnOrder - QuantityReserved

If QuantityOnHand <= 0          → CRITICAL - Out of Stock
If Available <= ReorderPoint    → Reorder Required
If Available <= ReorderPoint × 1.5 → Low Stock
Else                            → OK
```

### Inventory Business Rules
- Default reorder point: 100 units
- Default reorder quantity: 500 units
- Default lead time: 7 days
- Quantity on hand cannot go negative (UpdateQuantity validates)
- Every quantity change logged to InventoryTransactions table
- Reorder/Critical alerts shown via MsgBox when threshold crossed
- Color-coded grid display: Red = Critical, Yellow = Low, Green = OK

### Available Quantity
- Available = OnHand - Reserved (minimum 0)

### Inventory Value
- Total Value = QuantityOnHand × UnitCost

### Expected Delivery
- If LastOrderDate exists: LastOrderDate + LeadTimeDays
- Otherwise: Today + LeadTimeDays

## 4. Part Number Validation (clsPart.ValidatePartNumber)

### Format Rules
- Must contain at least one hyphen
- 2-4 segments separated by hyphens
- First segment: 2-4 uppercase alpha characters (category prefix)
- Second segment: 1-8 characters (typically numeric)
- Total length: max 20 characters
- Valid prefixes: PP, PPM, PPA, MFG, ASM, RAW, HDW, ELC
- Unknown prefixes allowed but logged as warnings
- Part numbers auto-uppercased on assignment

## 5. Quality Control (frmQualityCheck.frm)

### QC Results
| Result     | Action                                          |
|------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| Pass       | Work order continues normally                   |
| Fail       | Work order status auto-set to "On Hold"        |
| Conditional| Accepted with documented conditions             |
| Recheck    | Requires re-inspection at later date            |

### QC Data Captured
- Inspector name, check date
- Measurements (free text)
- Defect count, sample size
- Environmental: Temperature, Humidity
- Notes

### Business Rule
- When QC result = "Fail", the associated work order's status is automatically changed to "On Hold"

## 6. Shipping (frmShipping.frm)

### Shipping Rules
- Can only ship work orders with status "Completed"
- Manifest number auto-generated
- Carriers supported: UPS, FedEx, USPS, DHL, Freight, Local Delivery
- Ship-to address auto-populated from customer record
- Weight and box count tracked
- Freight cost recorded

### Auto-Actions on Ship
- Work order status updated to "Completed" (if not already)
- Manifest record created in ShippingManifests table
- Shipping label can be printed

## 7. Reporting (frmReports.frm + modPrinting.bas)

### Report Types
1. Work Orders by Status - Filtered by status, date range
2. Shipping Labels - For selected manifests
3. Inventory Status - Current stock levels and reorder alerts
4. Quality Control Summary - QC results by date range

### Print Infrastructure
- Primary: Crystal Reports 8.5 ActiveX
- Fallback: Direct Windows API printing (Printer object)
- Preview supported before printing
- Hardcoded report paths: C:\PrecisionParts\Reports\

## 8. Database Operations (modDatabase.bas)

### Connection Management
- Global ADO connection (g_Connection)
- Jet OLEDB 4.0 provider with embedded password
- Auto-reconnect with 3 retries on failure
- 30-second connection/command timeout
- Client-side cursor location

### Transaction Support
- BeginTransaction / CommitTransaction / RollbackTransaction
- Used for multi-table operations

### Maintenance
- BackupDatabase: File copy with timestamp naming
- CompactDatabase: JRO.JetEngine compact and repair

## 9. Utility Functions (modUtilities.bas)

### Data Safety Functions
- SafeString, SafeNumber, SafeLong, SafeDate, SafeBool — null-safe value extraction
- SQLSafe — single-quote escaping for SQL strings
- SQLDate, SQLDateTime — Access date format (#mm/dd/yyyy#)
- IsValidPartNumber — regex-like part number validation

### Formatting
- FormatCurrency2 — currency display
- FormatQuantity — quantity with commas
- FormatPercentage — percentage display

### Generation
- GenerateWorkOrderNumber — "WO-YYYYMMDD-NNN" pattern
- GetNextID — MAX(ID) + 1 for auto-increment

### Logging
- LogMessage — writes to daily log file (C:\PrecisionParts\Logs\)
- Format: [timestamp] message

### Export
- ExportToCSV — MSFlexGrid data to CSV file
